Name: Screen Space Reflections
Description: Covers parameters relating to Screen Space Reflections.

Fields.Name: Enable Screen Space Reflections
Fields.Description: Enables or disables screen-space reflections for reflective surfaces in the scene.

Fields.Name: Traverse Mode
Fields.Description: Selects the algorithm or strategy used for ray traversal during SSR sampling.

Fields.Name: Shininess Reject Threshold
Fields.Description: Controls the minimum surface shininess required for SSR to be applied.

Fields.Name: Depth Reject Threshold
Fields.Description: Rejects reflection samples based on depth discontinuities to reduce incorrect reflections.

Fields.Name: Fade To Viewer Start
Fields.Description: Distance at which SSR begins fading out toward the viewer to reduce artifacts.

Fields.Name: Fresnel Reject Threshold
Fields.Description: Controls how strongly Fresnel response affects rejection of reflection contributions.

Fields.ID: SSR Ray Trace Step Scale Min
Fields.Name: Ray Trace Step Scale Minimum
Fields.Description: Minimum step size used when marching rays through screen space for reflection tracing.

Fields.ID: SSR Ray Trace Step Scale Max
Fields.Name: Ray Trace Step Scale Maximum
Fields.Description: Maximum step size used when marching rays for screen-space reflection tracing.

Fields.Name: Display Mip Scale
Fields.Description: Scales the mip level used when sampling reflection textures for performance vs quality balance.

Fields.Name: Display Mip Offset
Fields.Description: Offsets the mip level selection for reflection sampling to adjust sharpness.

Fields.Name: Depth Fade Range
Fields.Description: Defines the distance range over which reflections fade out based on depth.

Fields.Name: Geometry Crack Detect Factor
Fields.Description: Helps detect and reduce reflection artifacts caused by geometric discontinuities or surface cracks.

Fields.Name: Texture Blur Sigma
Fields.Description: Controls Gaussian blur strength applied to reflection textures.

Fields.ID: SSR Tex Blur Sigma for Mip
Fields.Name: Texture Blur Sigma for Mip
Fields.Description: Adjusts blur strength for lower mip levels of reflection textures.

Fields.Name: SSR Alpha Boost
Fields.Description: Boosts the intensity or opacity of reflection contributions, making SSR results appear stronger or more pronounced.
